summary: Deterministic combat-resolution foundation extracted into pure helpers and wired into App.jsx bullet/enemy and obstacle-bounce paths.
Objective mastery chains and four new achievements shipped.
Local zero-token Run Brain, Run History Bounty Board, and first-three-run onboarding added.
Heat Meter visual overlay and replay-contract confidence hardening shipped.
Legacy MenuScreen lazy-loaded to reduce default bundle pressure.

validation.tests: npx vitest run --pool=threads --fileParallelism=false --reporter=dot: 315/315 passing across 41 files
validation.build: npm run build: clean; main chunk 730.41 kB raw / 222.57 kB gzip; MenuScreen chunk 69.40 kB raw / 17.07 kB gzip
validation.notes: Vitest emitted expected jsdom canvas getContext warnings from DemoCanvas tests only.

next: validate-replay Phase 2B: actual headless deterministic resim from seed + inputHash using pure combat helpers; quarantine >2% drift.
App.jsx extraction slice 11: enemy bullet/player hit resolution and grenade explosion damage.
HomeV2/MenuScreen retirement gate after Lighthouse and funnel data confirm HomeV2 wins.
blockers: Cloudflare API tokens lack account zone-create scope; founder must add zones or provide broader token.
Namecheap API remains blocked until current public IP is added to the allowlist.
Real-device PWA/gamepad QA and analytics key setup remain human-gated.
